description_long: This object is a sleek, black shotgun with a cylindrical main body and a series of metallic details along its side, including a prominent silver plate with small circular indentations. The barrel is elongated and features a ribbed texture, likely for grip or heat dissipation, and the rear section includes a rounded end with a visible red button or indicator. The top of the shotgun has a small protruding sight or mounting rail, and the overall finish is glossy, reflecting light along its smooth surfaces. The handle area is integrated into the main body, with a subtle ergonomic curve for gripping. The object appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with some plastic or polymer components, and is designed for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A glossy black shotgun with a ribbed barrel, metallic side plate, and integrated handle, featuring a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, ribbed barrel, metallic side plate, and top-mounted sight.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and ribbed texture, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth body, ribbed barrel, and a red button or indicator near the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rounded end, integrated handle, and visible red button, with the barrel receding away.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with ribbed texture and no visible venting or ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
